_doc: Cumulative trial count for the family-wise Deflated-Sharpe correction (AUD-003). Every diagnostic that computes deflated_sharpe_ratio MUST read cumulative_n_trials from here instead of passing a per-run/guessed value, otherwise DSR overstates significance (it deflates as if only the current run's arms were tried). A 'trial' = one independent strategy configuration evaluated for a PROMOTE/KILL decision against the locked honest base. Pure measurement diagnostics that make no trade decision (e.g. 0021 IC, 0003 forward-wall) are NOT trials. This file is reconciled + finalized in Phase 5 of the wiring audit; until then treat cumulative_n_trials as a working lower bound.
finalized_note: 2026-06-12 — denominator = ARM-LEVEL (conservative; family-level 23 recorded as the alternative). Owner sign-off via the approved post-0028 path-forward plan (Phase 1a). Loader (validation.overfitting.cumulative_n_trials) wired into run_sleeve_walkforward / run_balanced_scorecard / run_weighting_ablation / run_overfitting as the --n-trials default; score_0025_gate + score_0025b_gate already read this file. Arm counts spot-checked against prereg docs during the 2026-06-12 prereg sweep. Open follow-up (not blocking): re-state 0020/0022 + locked-base DSR under this denominator.
methodology: arm-level count of trade-bearing strategy configs evaluated on the locked honest base (each multi-arm ablation contributes its arm count). Family-level count (~20) is a less-conservative alternative; the arm-level count deflates more and is the safer denominator.

Motivated by FINDING_cash_starvation: 19,151 fills abandoned for cash, only ~2% of signal windows taken, and the CRS queue serves the EXTENDED version of a setup (MAXHEALTH early window +3.00R vs the -1.38R actually taken). Queue REORDERING is killed (near_sma fill-priority -0.80 Sharpe; CRS-strongest-first is load-bearing) so this adds SEATS instead. NOT a relitigation of 0073/0020 conviction sizing (mean-preserved TILTS) nor 0003 Kelly (momentum book, 3% risk) — a flat risk-LEVEL change on this book motivated by slot count has no record. Values derived from risk = 0.142 x target_notional, not swept. Mechanism check declared: skipped_cash MUST fall and trades MUST rise, else the arm is uninformative (the FINDING_decouple lesson). Skeptical prior: CAGR likely falls; dilution risk is the real question since CRS sits at the 99-100th pct of selection skill and more seats means going deeper down the queue toward the random null 0.74. Skeptical prior: entry changes 0-for-12, and 0092 readout warns a visibly-rising 44w SMA is a LATE signal (lagging MA => mature trend), so the floor may select LATER/more-extended entries. Mechanism check declared: if median entry extension RISES that is the late-signal effect. Pre-reg research/preregistry_slope5.md. Pre-reg research/preregistry_lockin_live.md. Counted BEFORE the run. family_level 72->73. 2026-07-16: 124->126 — intraweek 2R/3R booking for CAPITAL ROTATION (owner claim: book 2R/3R intraweek to free cash and rotate into new opportunities). TWO arms on the LIVE book (A-only + LIVE_DISCIPLINE): A tp_on_high (2R half at the intraweek high via resting limit vs weekly close), B scaled_exit(60%@2R,40%@3R intraweek limits, replaces P2 trend exit). Registry: tp_on_high KILLED (0.709/-49.7%) and scaled_exit 60/40 KILLED (0.64) but BOTH omitted the rotation metric and neither ran on the live discipline book — new formulation + new measurement (does skipped_cash fall enough to offset truncation?). Mechanism check declared: skipped_cash MUST fall and trades rise, else rotation is not the mechanism. Skeptical prior: the ~19k skipped fills are the 98%% CRS is right to refuse (FINDING_cash_starvation/FINDING_more_slots), so freed cash buys worse signals and Sharpe falls anyway. Pre-reg research/preregistry_intraweek_rotate.md. Counted BEFORE the run. family_level 73->74. 2026-07-16: 126->127 — 70%%@2R + 30%% runner-to-44wSMA (owner tail-preserving hybrid). scaled_exit(tp1_r=2.0, tp1_frac=0.70, tp2_frac=0.0): 70%% books at 2R intraweek, 30%% runs until a weekly close below the 44w SMA (wsma_at, verified). On the LIVE book (A-only + LIVE_DISCIPLINE). NEW formulation answering the FINDING_intraweek_rotate objection: arm B (60/40) capped every winner at 2.4R and failed to ship; this keeps a 30%% runner with NO upper target so the fat tail is partially preserved. Distinct from LIVE P2 (50%% half + trend trail) and the confounded 60/40 KILL (R-cap-5%%). Mechanism check: max R must rise well above B 2.4R. Skeptical prior: still books 70%% at a fixed target (partial truncation), 2022-26 slice likely between B 1.03 and LIVE 1.04, no promote. Pre-reg research/preregistry_7030_runner.md. Counted BEFORE the run. family_level 74->75. 2026-07-16: 127->128 — 60%%@2R / 30%%@3R / 10%% deep runner (runner_cap_r=6, runner_sma_buffer=0.15: ride through SMA touches, exit at 6R or 15%% below the 44w SMA). Owner fix for the 70/30 bleed (which sold AT the SMA ~14%% below entry). New engine knobs, golden byte-identical. Disclosed approximation: if-not-3R-sell-at-2R is not literally implementable, so the 30%% missing 3R rides the runner (up to 40%% on the deep runner). 6th exit variant; multiple-testing bar high. Skeptical prior: 15%%-below-SMA is ~29%% below entry, very loose, so lands between B 1.03 and 70/30 0.29, no promote. Pre-reg research/preregistry_603010_deeprunner.md. Counted BEFORE the run. family_level 75->76.

0069-breadth-position-size.note: Breadth/position-size confirmation of the 0068 mechanism. 0068 PROMOTED on shape but deploy% barely fell + avg_positions ROSE -> the benefit looked like under-diversification (concentrated ~13.4/15-name book), not vol-targeting de-gross. Tests that DIRECTLY with a frozen-cfg continuous-curve grid: CONCENTRATE_8 (opposite-direction control: fewer names should DEEPEN DD), BREADTH_RISK_25 (constant-aggregate-risk path: lower risk_per_trade + more slots), BREADTH_CAP_25 + BREADTH_CAP_30 (cap path: lower max_position_pct + more slots — needs the cfg max_position_pct now honored by portfolio.simulate, a live/backtest parity fix; golden byte-identical at cfg=15), COMBO_25_vol (breadth+vol stacked, best-achievable probe). V2_vol_ref re-run as an in-run same-data reference (counted under 0068, not re-counted). Same SHAPE gates (Calmar up / paired-Sharpe-CI / MaxDD<=0.9xOFF / >=2-crash-spread) on the best breadth arm; the attribution block names breadth-vs-de-gross-vs-vol and verifies the levers ENGAGED (avg_positions). DSR informational. Counted BEFORE the cloud run. VERDICT: KILL — breadth IS real diversification (names 13.5->24-29 at maintained ~95% deploy) and cuts MaxDD (-45.6->-37) but COSTS 4-6pp CAGR (edge concentrated in top names); CONCENTRATE_8 keeps highest CAGR at same DD; -45 floor is the COVID-2020 SYSTEMATIC crash, not concentration.

0070-crash-overlay.note: Systematic-crash EXPOSURE overlay — the road to -30 after 0069 proved COVID-2020 is the binding systematic floor. New mechanism: a per-date market-state exposure scalar in [floor,1] from an equal-weight universe index, TRAILING-ONLY, LAGGED one day (single lag point _lh_overlay_core.lag_exposure), multiplied into simulate sizing equity alongside the 0068 vol_scalar (None -> golden byte-identical). FIVE new arms / THREE signals (design-panel consensus, all CONTINUOUS + FAST-RE-ENGAGE fixes to the KILLED binary 200DMA gate which stayed in cash for months during the V-recovery): SEMIDEV + SEMIDEV_AGGR (index downside-semideviation, short window — leads on the down-leg, decays fast as up-days contribute 0), MKTDD (index peak-drawdown circuit-breaker — 1.0 within X% of peak, fires only in deep market drawdowns), BREADTH_REG (continuous breadth + index-trend), SEMIDEV_x_VOL68 (semidev stacked on the 0068 book-vol target). VOL68_ref re-run as in-run reference (counted under 0068). DD/CAGR FRONTIER verdict (which signal pushes the 2020 floor furthest toward -30 at least CAGR cost; beats 0068?), SHAPE gates on the best overlay; DSR informational. Tail-hedge route to -30 (defined-risk index puts) DEFERRED — needs the options backtester / vol-carry program. Counted BEFORE the cloud run.

Every arm dSharpe point <=0, DSR 0.16-0.49. IC != portfolio Sharpe (cf. 52wh 0079): a real orthogonal IC (~0.03, PIT-clean per 0017) dilutes the ranker more than the DD it buys.
